_skipped.granitevision: HF folder not present in /tmp/hf_transformers_pinned/src/transformers/models/ (commit da6c53e4). Likely renamed/removed.
_skipped.holovision: HF folder not present in /tmp/hf_transformers_pinned/src/transformers/models/. Not a recognized model id at the pinned commit.
_skipped.hunyuan_v2: HF folder not present at the pinned commit. (hunyuan_v1_dense / hunyuan_v1_moe / hy_v3 are present, but no v2.)
_skipped.hunyuan_video: HF folder not present at the pinned commit. (kb-nano has L4/hunyuan_video.py, but the HF transformers tree at this pin does not include this folder.)

_caveats: GPT-2 / GPT-BigCode / GPT-Neo / GPT-J / GPT-NeoX-Japanese all use a 2-layer fc1+act+fc2 MLP with bias. None map to L2/llama_mlp.py (SwiGLU). They decompose to L1/{linear, gelu, layer_norm, sdpa}.
GPT-2 attention uses Conv1D (legacy 1D-conv-as-Linear) and supports cross-attention via a separate q_attn projection. No kb-nano file replicates this exactly; decomposes to L1.

GPT-OSS HF class mapping notes: kb-nano has BOTH L2/gpt_oss_attention.py (standalone) and L2/attention.py (LlamaAttention with use_sinks/sliding_window flags). The actual L3/gpt_oss_decoder.py uses LlamaAttention, NOT the standalone gpt_oss_attention.py. We map GptOssAttention to BOTH (the standalone is the dedicated wrapper; LlamaAttention is what the engine actually uses).

Granite/GraniteMoE/Hunyuan-V1 attention all override LlamaAttention only to change `self.scaling = config.attention_multiplier` and (Hunyuan only) add q_norm/k_norm post-RoPE. Routes to L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention which has the qk_norm flag.
GraniteMoeHybrid mixes Mamba2 layers with attention layers (BambaMixer reused). Mamba layers decompose to L2/mamba2_mixer.py.
Helium uses interleaved-RoPE (cos/sin interleaved via repeat_interleave) which differs from standard NeoX RoPE; kb-nano's L1/rotary_emb.py covers both layouts via the `is_neox_style` flag.
GLM-ASR is a Whisper-derived speech encoder with rotary embeddings, GQA (separate q/k/v with bias on q/v/o, no bias on k), non-causal attention. No exact kb-nano match; decomposes to L1.
Granite_Speech is a Conformer encoder (relative position emb, depthwise conv, GLU+SiLU+BatchNorm conv module). No kb-nano match; decomposes to L1.

GroupViT has CLIP-style attention with bias and configurable activation MLP (typically GELU, NOT QuickGELU). L2/clip_attention.py is the closest kernel match (decomposes the same way) but the MLP activation differs from L2/clip_mlp.py (which hard-codes QuickGELU). We map GroupViTMLP to composes-from-L1 (linear + ACT2FN[gelu] + linear).
GLPN uses SegFormer's efficient self-attention with sequence-reduction (sr_ratio Conv2d+LayerNorm to compress KV). No kb-nano file replicates this; decomposes to L1.
Hiera uses a fused QKV Linear with optional max-pool query stride and windowed mask-unit attention (no equivalent in kb-nano). Decomposes to L1.
Hubert uses Bart-style attention (separate Q/K/V with bias, no RoPE). Per the prompt's Bart-family rule, decomposes to L1/{linear, dense_attention/sdpa, store_kvcache}.

GotOcr2 vision tower is SAM-derived (windowed attention with decomposed relative position embeddings, fused QKV). No kb-nano match; decomposes to L1. The text side reuses a Qwen2 LLM via Llava wiring (composes).

GroundingDino has many bespoke parts: MultiScaleDeformableAttention (kb-nano has rtdetrv2_deformable_attention.py for a related kernel), bidirectional fusion attention, decoder cross-attention. Most classes decompose to L1; the deformable parts loosely map to L1/rtdetrv2_deformable_attention.py.
HGNetV2 is a pure-CNN backbone (Conv2d/BatchNorm/ReLU/MaxPool); decomposes to L1.

HY_V3 uses ApertusAttention as base (q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm, GQA, bias=False), DeepseekV3DecoderLayer wiring. Maps attention to L2/attention.py with qk_norm=True. MoE has shared-expert pattern with sigmoid routing -> L2/shared_expert_moe.py.

classes.name: GlmAsrAttention
classes.rationale: Encoder GQA with separate q/k/v (bias on q/v/o, no bias on k), non-causal, partial RoPE on first rotary_dim. No kb-nano file matches exactly: encoder_attention.py has no RoPE; whisper encoder has no RoPE; LlamaAttention is causal+fused-QKV. Decomposes to L1/{linear, rotary_emb, dense_attention or sdpa}.

classes.name: GlmAsrMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN + fc2 (no SwiGLU). Pattern matches CLIP/whisper MLP family; activation is config-driven (typically silu). Decomposes to L1/{linear, silu (or gelu)}.

classes.name: GlmAsrEncoder
classes.rationale: composes: 2 Conv1d (mel) + GELU + N x EncoderLayer + final LayerNorm + RoPE.

classes.name: GLPNEfficientSelfAttention
classes.rationale: SegFormer's efficient self-attention with sequence reduction (sr_ratio Conv2d + LayerNorm to compress KV before attention). No kb-nano file matches; decomposes to L1/{linear, conv2d, layer_norm, softmax, bmm}.

classes.name: GLPNMixFFN
classes.rationale: linear -> dwconv -> act -> linear. Decomposes to L1/{linear, conv2d, gelu}.

classes.name: GLPNLayer
classes.rationale: composes: norm + attention + drop_path + norm + MixFFN.

classes.name: GLPNEncoder
classes.rationale: composes: hierarchical patch embeddings + layers + layer norms.

classes.name: GLPNSelectiveFeatureFusion
classes.rationale: Conv+BN+ReLU stack with sigmoid attention map.

classes.name: GotOcr2MLPBlock
classes.rationale: Inherits SamMLPBlock: lin1 + ACT2FN[gelu] + lin2. Decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}.

classes.name: GotOcr2VisionAttention
classes.rationale: SAM-style fused QKV vision attention with decomposed relative position embeddings (rel_pos_h / rel_pos_w einsums) and windowed attention. No kb-nano file matches; decomposes to L1/{linear, softmax, bmm}.

classes.name: GotOcr2VisionEncoder
classes.rationale: composes: patch embed + N layers + neck.

classes.name: GotOcr2Model
classes.rationale: composes: vision tower + projector + Qwen2 LLM.

classes.name: GPT2Attention
classes.rationale: Decoder-style causal attention with Conv1D (1D-conv-as-Linear) fused QKV (3*embed_dim) and optional cross-attention path with separate q_attn. No RoPE; no kb-nano file matches Conv1D layout. Decomposes to L1/{linear (Conv1D treated as Linear), softmax, sdpa}.

classes.name: GPT2MLP
classes.rationale: Conv1D fc + GELU/relu + Conv1D fc. NOT SwiGLU. Decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}.

classes.name: GPT2Block
classes.rationale: composes: ln + attn (+ optional cross-attn) + ln + mlp.

classes.name: GPT2Model
classes.rationale: composes: token + position embeddings + N x GPT2Block + LayerNorm.

classes.name: GPTBigCodeAttention
classes.rationale: Multi-Query Attention (MQA): single fused Linear emits Q (full) + K/V (1 head each, kv_dim small). Causal, no RoPE. No kb-nano file matches MQA fused Linear layout exactly (LlamaAttention assumes QKVParallelLinear with explicit num_kv_heads); decomposes to L1/{linear, softmax, sdpa}.

classes.name: GPTBigCodeMLP
classes.rationale: fc + ACT2FN[gelu_pytorch_tanh] + fc. NOT SwiGLU. Decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}.

classes.name: GPTBigCodeModel
classes.rationale: composes: wte + wpe + N x Block + ln_f.

classes.name: GPTNeoSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Causal attention with separate q/k/v (no bias) and out_proj (with bias). Supports 'global' (full causal) and 'local' (sliding-window). No RoPE. No kb-nano file matches the q/k/v-no-bias + sliding-window mask layout used in eager path. Decomposes to L1/{linear, softmax, sdpa}.

classes.name: GPTNeoFlashAttention2
classes.rationale: Flash-attention variant of GPTNeoSelfAttention. Same compute decomposition; uses flash-attn kernel (kb-nano L1/flash_attn_varlen.py).

classes.name: GPTNeoAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class: dispatches to global vs local GPTNeoSelfAttention by config.attention_layers[layer_id]; composes.

classes.name: GPTNeoMLP
classes.rationale: fc + ACT2FN + fc + dropout. NOT SwiGLU. Decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}.

classes.name: GPTNeoXMLP
classes.rationale: dense_h_to_4h + ACT2FN + dense_4h_to_h with bias. NOT SwiGLU. Decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}.

classes.name: GPTNeoXRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard NeoX-style RoPE with optional partial_rotary_factor.

classes.name: GPTNeoXAttention
classes.rationale: Causal MHA with FUSED query_key_value Linear (3*hidden_size) and optional partial RoPE (rotary on first rotary_ndims dims). No GQA. No kb-nano file matches the fused 3-way Linear layout with partial RoPE; decomposes to L1/{linear, rotary_emb, sdpa}.

classes.name: GPTNeoXLayer
classes.rationale: composes: parallel-residual block (attention + mlp from same input).

classes.name: GPTNeoXJapaneseAttention
classes.rationale: Causal MHA with FUSED query_key_value (3*hidden_size, no bias), partial RoPE on first rotary_ndims dims, optional dense_bias on output (last layer only). Eager path uses baddbmm-based softmax. Decomposes to L1/{linear, rotary_emb, sdpa}.

classes.name: GPTNeoXJapaneseMLP
classes.rationale: dense_h_to_4h + ACT2FN + dense_4h_to_h, no bias. NOT SwiGLU. Decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}.

classes.name: GPTNeoXJapaneseLayer
classes.rationale: composes: ln + attn + bias_dropout_add + ln + mlp + bias_dropout_add.

classes.name: GptOssRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Standard RMSNorm; the only diff with Llama is fp32 weight cast on output (handled inside L1 RMSNorm).

classes.name: GptOssExperts
classes.rationale: MXFP4-quantized experts with OAI SwiGLU (gate*sigmoid(gate*alpha)*(up+1) with clamps). kb-nano keeps weights in packed MXFP4 uint8 and dispatches to mxfp4_moe.

classes.name: GptOssTopKRouter
classes.rationale: Linear (with bias) + topk + softmax. Wrapped inside L2/gpt_oss_moe.py.

classes.name: GptOssMLP
classes.rationale: Wraps router + experts. Maps to L2/gpt_oss_moe.py:GptOssMoE which does router + Mxfp4MoE call.

classes.name: GptOssAttention
classes.rationale: GQA + bias on Q/K/V/O, learnable per-head sinks, sliding window every other layer. L3/gpt_oss_decoder.py uses L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention with use_sinks=True/sliding_window=128. L2/gpt_oss_attention.py is a standalone alternative wrapper.

classes.name: GptOssModel
classes.rationale: composes: embed + N layers + norm. Top-level wiring in L4/gpt_oss.py.

classes.name: GPTJAttention
classes.rationale: Causal MHA with separate q/k/v/out_proj (no bias), GPT-J interleaved RoPE on first rotary_dim (rotate_every_two layout, NOT NeoX). Eager path uses upcast-fp32 attention. Decomposes to L1/{linear, rotary_emb (interleaved), sdpa}.

classes.name: GPTJMLP
classes.rationale: fc_in + ACT2FN + fc_out (with bias). NOT SwiGLU. Decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}.

classes.name: GPTJBlock
classes.rationale: composes: parallel-residual (single ln, attn + mlp from same input).

classes.name: GraniteAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaAttention; only differs in self.scaling = config.attention_multiplier. Maps to LlamaAttention (causal, GQA, RoPE).

classes.name: GraniteDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: composes: input_layernorm + self_attn + residual_multiplier + post_attention_layernorm + mlp + residual_multiplier. Same wiring as LlamaDecoderLayer with extra residual_multiplier scalar.

classes.name: GraniteModel
classes.rationale: composes: embed*embedding_multiplier + N layers + norm + RoPE. Reuses Llama-style L4 wiring.

classes.name: GraniteSpeechEncoderProjector
classes.rationale: QFormer-style cross-attention projector (BLIP-2 derived) followed by Linear. Decomposes to L1/{linear, layer_norm, sdpa}.

classes.name: GraniteSpeechConformerFeedForward
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear + SiLU + dropout + Linear (fc1+silu+fc2). Decomposes to L1/{layer_norm, linear, silu}.

classes.name: GraniteSpeechConformerAttention
classes.rationale: Conformer attention with Shaw's relative position embeddings (einsum-based); chunked attention by context_size blocks; SDPA via MATH backend. No kb-nano match; decomposes to L1/{linear, embedding, sdpa}.

classes.name: GraniteSpeechConformerConvModule
classes.rationale: Conformer conv module: LayerNorm + Conv1d + GLU + DepthwiseConv1d + BatchNorm1d + SiLU + Conv1d. Decomposes to L1/{layer_norm, conv1d, silu}.

classes.name: GraniteSpeechCTCEncoder
classes.rationale: composes: input Linear + N x ConformerBlock + intermediate CTC head. Halfway through, adds soft CTC re-input.

classes.name: GraniteMoeParallelExperts
classes.rationale: JetMoe-style parallel experts: per-expert grouped Linear segments. Maps to grouped-GEMM kernel.

classes.name: GraniteMoeMoE
classes.rationale: Dispatch tokens to experts via batch_index/expert_size, run two-layer MLP with chunk-then-act-then-mul pattern (SwiGLU-like). Closest kb-nano analogue is jamba_moe.py / fused_experts pattern (FusedExperts.gather + grouped-GEMM).

classes.name: GraniteMoeAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaAttention; only difference is self.scaling = config.attention_multiplier.

classes.name: GraniteMoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: composes: norm + attention + residual_multiplier + norm + MoE + residual_multiplier.

classes.name: GraniteMoeModel
classes.rationale: composes: embed + N layers + norm. Differs from Mixtral only by no-sliding causal mask and embedding_multiplier.

classes.name: GraniteMoeHybridAttention
classes.rationale: Same q/k/v/o + (optional) RoPE + GQA + LlamaAttention scaling pattern. Maps to LlamaAttention.

classes.name: GraniteMoeHybridMambaLayer
classes.rationale: BambaMixer (Mamba2 SSD) reused; maps to Mamba2 mixer.

classes.name: GraniteMoeHybridRMSNormGated
classes.rationale: Gated RMSNorm used inside Mamba2 (norm * silu(gate)).

classes.name: GraniteMoeHybridMLP
classes.rationale: input_linear (gate_up fused, 2*shared_intermediate_size) + chunk + activation*up + output_linear. SwiGLU-like; maps to LlamaMLP with intermediate_size=shared_intermediate_size.

classes.name: GraniteMoeHybridMoE
classes.rationale: Same as GraniteMoeMoE; routed experts + shared expert pattern.

classes.name: GraniteMoeHybridDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: composes: ln + (attn or mamba) + residual_mult + ln + (moe + shared_mlp) + residual_mult. Mixed attention/mamba layer types per index.

classes.name: GraniteMoeHybridModel
classes.rationale: composes: embed + N hybrid layers + norm + RoPE (optional).

classes.name: GraniteMoeSharedMLP
classes.rationale: input_linear (2*shared_intermediate_size, fused gate_up) + chunk + ACT2FN(gate)*up + output_linear. SwiGLU pattern; LlamaMLP with custom intermediate_size.

classes.name: GraniteMoeSharedDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: composes: same as GraniteMoeDecoderLayer plus optional shared_mlp added to MoE output before residual.

classes.name: MultiScaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: MultiScale deformable attention kernel; same op as RT-DETR-v2 deformable attention.

classes.name: GroundingDinoConvEncoder
classes.rationale: composes: timm/SwinTransformer backbone + freeze BN + multi-scale features.

classes.name: GroundingDinoMultiscaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: Linear sampling-offsets + Linear attn-weights + deformable attention kernel + Linear output.

classes.name: GroundingDinoTextEnhancerLayer
classes.rationale: composes: text self-attention + FFN with sinusoidal pos.

classes.name: GroundingDinoBiMultiHeadAttention
classes.rationale: Bidirectional cross-attention between vision and text features (separate Q/K/V/O for each direction). Decomposes to L1/{linear, softmax, sdpa}.

classes.name: GroundingDinoEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: composes: text enhancer + fusion + deformable layers.

classes.name: GroundingDinoMultiheadAttention
classes.rationale: Standard MHA with separate Q/K/V/O (bias). Decomposes to L1/{linear, softmax, sdpa}.

classes.name: GroundingDinoDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: composes: self-attn + cross-attn (text) + cross-attn (vision via deformable) + FFN.

classes.name: GroundingDinoContrastiveEmbedding
classes.rationale: Contrastive matching head for label predictions.

classes.name: GroundingDinoModel
classes.rationale: composes: backbone + text encoder + encoder + decoder.

classes.name: GroundingDinoMLPPredictionHead
classes.rationale: MLP with N hidden Linear+ReLU layers + final Linear.

classes.name: GroupViTAssignAttention
classes.rationale: Custom assign attention with hard-softmax / Gumbel-softmax along key dim. No kb-nano match.

classes.name: GroupViTMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN + fc2 (with bias). NOT SwiGLU. Decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu (or quickgelu)}; closely parallels L2/clip_mlp.py but with configurable ACT2FN.

classes.name: GroupViTMixerMLP
classes.rationale: Same as GroupViTMLP but applied along token dim (transpose before/after).

classes.name: GroupViTAttention
classes.rationale: Standard MHA with separate q/k/v/out_proj (bias=True), no causal mask, supports cross-attention via encoder_hidden_states. Same compute pattern as CLIP attention.

classes.name: GroupViTTextTransformer
classes.rationale: composes: text embeddings + text encoder + final LN.

classes.name: GroupViTVisionTransformer
classes.rationale: composes: vision embeddings + vision encoder + final LN.

classes.name: HeliumRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Standard RMSNorm with fp32 weight cast.

classes.name: HeliumRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: LlamaRotaryEmbedding. apply_rotary_pos_emb in this file uses INTERLEAVED layout (cos/sin via repeat_interleave on first half), matching kb-nano's NeoX-vs-interleaved RoPE flag.

classes.name: HeliumAttention
classes.rationale: GraniteAttention base + override o_proj (no bias) + scaling = 1/sqrt(head_dim). LlamaAttention (causal, GQA, RoPE).

classes.name: HGNetV2LearnableAffineBlock
classes.rationale: Learnable affine: scale*x + bias. Trivial elementwise.

classes.name: HGNetV2ConvLayerLight
classes.rationale: composes: 1x1 conv + depthwise NxN conv (no act / act respectively).

classes.name: HGNetV2BasicLayer
classes.rationale: composes: ConvLayers (light or normal) + 1x1 squeeze + 1x1 excitation + drop_path + residual.

classes.name: HGNetV2Stage
classes.rationale: composes: optional downsample conv + N x BasicLayer.

classes.name: HieraPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch embedder with masked-conv (zero-out masked regions before conv).

classes.name: HieraEmbeddings
classes.rationale: composes: patch_embeddings + position_embeddings (with optional bicubic interpolation).

classes.name: HieraMaskUnitAttention
classes.rationale: Fused QKV linear (3*hidden_size_output), reshape into mask-units (windowed), optional max-pool query stride for hierarchical pooling, dot-product attention. No kb-nano match. Decomposes to L1/{linear, max_pool2d, softmax, bmm}.

classes.name: HieraMlp
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN + fc2 (bias). NOT SwiGLU. Decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}.

classes.name: HieraLayer
classes.rationale: composes: ln_before + (optional proj+max_pool when channels grow) + attn + drop_path + ln_after + mlp.

classes.name: HieraEncoder
classes.rationale: composes: ModuleList of HieraStage with reroll/unroll utilities.

classes.name: HubertPositionalConvEmbedding
classes.rationale: Grouped Conv1d with weight-norm + GELU + same-pad.

classes.name: HubertSamePadLayer
classes.rationale: Right-trim 1 element when conv kernel is even. Trivial.

classes.name: HubertFeatureEncoder
classes.rationale: composes: stack of Conv1d + (LayerNorm | GroupNorm | none) + GELU.

classes.name: HubertFeatureProjection
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear + dropout (modeling expanded shows this).

classes.name: HubertAttention
classes.rationale: (modeling_hubert.py) Bart-style attention with separate Q/K/V/Out proj (bias=True), supports cross-attention. No RoPE. Per Bart-family rule: decomposes to L1/{linear, dense_attention/sdpa, store_kvcache}.

classes.name: HubertFeedForward
classes.rationale: (modeling_hubert.py) intermediate_dense + ACT2FN + intermediate_dropout + output_dense + output_dropout. NOT SwiGLU. Decomposes to L1/{linear, gelu}.

classes.name: HubertEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: (modeling_hubert.py) composes: attn + dropout + residual + ln + ff + ln (post-norm).

classes.name: HubertEncoderLayerStableLayerNorm
classes.rationale: (modeling_hubert.py) composes: pre-LN attn + residual + pre-LN ff + adapter (optional).

classes.name: HubertAttnAdapterLayer
classes.rationale: (modeling_hubert.py) LayerNorm + Linear + ReLU + Linear adapter. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: HunYuanDenseV1Attention
classes.rationale: LlamaAttention + per-head q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm applied AFTER RoPE. Maps to LlamaAttention with qk_norm=True flag (kb-nano applies QK norm before RoPE for Qwen3, but the same kernel is reused; numeric difference noted).

classes.name: HunYuanDenseV1RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: DynamicNTKAlphaRotary + standard RoPE; same L1 kernel (parameters differ, kernel is same).

classes.name: HunYuanMoEV1Attention
classes.rationale: Same as HunYuanDenseV1Attention: q_norm/k_norm post-RoPE. LlamaAttention with qk_norm flag.

classes.name: HunYuanMoEV1Moe
classes.rationale: softmax+topk routing + experts + shared MLP added at end. Shared-expert MoE pattern.

classes.name: HunYuanMoEV1DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: composes: norm + attn + norm + (MoE + shared MLP).

classes.name: HYV3MLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP with optional intermediate_size override (used as shared expert in MoE).

classes.name: HYV3Attention
classes.rationale: Inherits ApertusAttention: separate Q/K/V/O Linear, GQA, q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm BEFORE RoPE, scaling=head_dim**-0.5, attention_bias=False. Maps to LlamaAttention with qk_norm=True (Qwen3-style).

classes.name: HYV3TopKRouter
classes.rationale: Linear (fp32) + sigmoid + e_score_correction_bias-aware topk + renormalize + router_scaling_factor multiply. Kimi/DeepSeek-V3-style sigmoid router (with correction bias).

classes.name: HYV3Experts
classes.rationale: Qwen3MoE-style experts (gate_up_proj packed + down_proj). Grouped-GEMM kernel.

classes.name: HYV3MoE
classes.rationale: Shared-expert MoE: routed experts + shared SwiGLU expert; sigmoid routing with correction bias and routed_scaling_factor; optional fp32 combine. Maps to SharedExpertMoE (correction_bias=True, routing='sigmoid').

classes.name: HYV3DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: composes: norm + attn + norm + (MoE | dense MLP, per layer_type).

classes.name: HYV3Model
classes.rationale: composes: embed + N hybrid layers + norm + RoPE.
